verses.text: Ka khuadakna tausang tungah kahto-in, Topa in kei tungah bang hong gen ding a, ka lungkimlohna teng hong bangci dawn' hiam, cih ka ngak hi
Tua ciangin Topa in hih bangin hong dawng a, “Nangmah ka hong muhsak thu khempeuh a simnop mahmah dingin tungman peek tungah gelh in

Hih thu a tun'na ding hun hi pah nailo ahih manin lai-in ciamteh in. Ahi zongin hong tung baihta ding a, kong lah khempeuh a manin hong tung ding hi. A tung hak tawh a kibangkha ahi zongin ngak keikai in. Ka seh hun a cin' ciangin hong tung takpi ding a, zekai lua nawnlo ding hi
Tua a hong tung ding thu pen ‘A gilo mite suaktalo ding a, thuman mite ahih leh Pasian tungah a cihtak manun nungta ding hi,’” a hong ci hi

Hauhna pen zuaupi hi a, a huaiham mite kiphasakin omkhong theilo uh a, hankhuk mah bangin, phazo, cih omsak theilo uh a, lungkim hun cih nei theilo uh hi. Tua ahih manin minam dangte a ban banin simin a uk uh hi.

A zawhna gammite in amau a zo mite simmawh bawlin, “No-a' ahi lopi kimlai no-a' dingin na la uh a, ahi zongin tu-in gimna na thuak ding uh hi. Note tungah lei hong bate khem bawlin, bang tanvei na hauhna uh behlap nuam lailai na hi uh hiam?” ci ding uh hi
Note in na phawk ma-un note mahmah leiba neite na suak ding uh a, na leiba uh a meet hong kisungsak ding hi. Galte in note hong lingsak keuhkeuh ding a, na nate uh hong laksakmang khin ding hi
Note in minam dang tampite' na na sut uh a, tu-in a omlai mite in note' na hong sut ding uh hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note in mi thatin, khuapite leh a sunga teng mite na bawlsia uh hi
Mi' van na suhna uh tawh na mite uh hausakin, lauhuaina leh siatna a ngahlohna dingin na innkuan uh bawl na hih manun gim na ngah ding uh hi
Note' vaihawmna mah in na mite uh tungah maizumna hong tun' a, minam dangte na suksiatna uh tawh, note mahmah' siatna ding a bawl na hi uh hi
Note a hong langpan' dingin kulh suangte nangawn hong kiko ding a, innkamte in zong kikopih ding uh hi
Note in mi thahna tawh khuapi satin, mawhna tawh khuapi phut na hih manun 3 gimna na ngah ding uh hi
Na zawh uh minamte' nasepnate a mawkna suakin, amau' sepsateng khempeuh a khu-in leengmang hi. Hih thu pen Vanglian Topa in a pian'sak ahi hi
Tuipi, tui tawh a kidim mah bangin Topa' minthan'na theihna tawh leitung kidim ding hi
Na hehna uh tawh na gamvengte uh niamkhiatin na mindaisak uh a, zukham bangin amaute hoisak na hih manun gimna na ngah ding uh hi

Tua ahih manin note in zong minthan'na ngahloin maizumin mindaina tawh na kidiah ding uh hi. Note mahmah in na hoi dongun na dawn ding uh hi. Topa in gimpiakna hai, note hong dawnsak ding a, na minthan'na uh mindaina a suak ding hi

Note in Lebanon gam singkungte phuk na hih manun note zong hong kiphuk ding a, a ganhingte zong that na hih manun tu-in ganhingte in note hong lausak ding uh hi. Gamsung khempeuhah mi thatin na bawlsiatna hang uh leh khuapite leh a sunga tengte na suksiatna hangun note tungah hih bangin a hong piang ding ahi hi
Milim, banga kimang ahi hiam? Mihingte' bawltawm na khat hi lel a, thuman hong gen theilo hi. Tua bangin a pau thei beeklo pasian a bawlpa in muan'in a neih bang phatuam ahi hiam

Sing khatpeuh a kibawl na khat kiangah, “Khanglo in,” ci-in, a pau theilo suangtum kiangah, “Tho in,” ci na hih manun gimna na ngah ding uh hi. Hih bang milim in note hong hilh thei ding ahi hiam? Ngun leh kham tawh limtakin a kizut hangin a sungah nuntakna omlo hi
Topa, a biakinn siangtho sungah om hi; leitung mi khempeuh ama mai-ah dai dide-in om ta uh hen.
